## [00:00 - 00:30]

How would you like to know how much action you need in order to achieve even your biggest goal? Well look, follow the strategies in this course and you will learn the exact and precise formulas for determining exactly how much action is necessary for you to achieve your goals and for you to achieve happiness in your life. Look, action alone, simply action alone will determine how much success and how far you go in your life.
